title: erigeron canadensis
intro: Erigeron canadensis, also known as Canadian fleabane or horseweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Erigeron canadensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
